subject: An armored knight mounted on a rearing brown warhorse, charging forward with a long lance leveled, against a blazing fire-lit backdrop
description: A fully armored knight rides a brown warhorse that rears up on its hind legs, front hooves lifted off the ground. The knight leans forward in the saddle and lowers a long lance toward the viewer's left, committing to a charge. The armor is polished steel with warm highlights catching the firelight. A crimson cape or caparison flares behind the rider. The background is an explosive wash of orange, red, and yellow flame, suggesting a battlefield engulfed in fire or the heat of a tournament charge. Lighting is harsh and directional, rim-lighting horse and rider against the inferno. The composition is dynamic, action-oriented, weighted slightly right with the lance driving the eye left.
foreground: armored knight on rearing warhorse with leveled lance
background: wash of fire and smoke, blazing orange and red
emotion: committed aggression, fearless charge, locked-in focus
